name: 赐福增伤
description: 赐福状态下下一次造成的伤害+4
code: function executeSkill(context) { const attacker = context.piece; if (!attacker) { return { message: '没有攻击者', success: false }; } let hasDivineBlessing = false; let blessingIntensity = 4; if (attacker.statusTags) { for (let i = 0; i < attacker.statusTags.length; i++) { const tag = attacker.statusTags[i]; if (typeof tag === 'object' && tag.type === 'divine-blessing-buff') { hasDivineBlessing = true; if (tag.intensity) { blessingIntensity = tag.intensity; } break; } } } if (hasDivineBlessing && context.damage) { context.damage = context.damage + blessingIntensity; if (typeof removeStatusEffectById === 'function') { removeStatusEffectById(attacker.instanceId, 'divine-blessing-buff'); } if (typeof removeRuleById === 'function') { removeRuleById(attacker.instanceId, 'rule-divine-blessing'); } if (typeof removeSkillById === 'function') { removeSkillById(attacker.instanceId, 'divine-blessing-damage'); } return { message: attacker.name + '的赐福使伤害+' + blessingIntensity + '，赐福效果消失', success: true }; } return { message: '未处于赐福状态', success: false }; }
